name: Forbidden Clue
summary: Give word-only clues, avoid the five forbidden words, and race the timer to score points.
objective: Help the group guess as many cards as possible without saying any forbidden word.

flow.giveHints: Use only words to help your partner or team guess.
flow.forbidden: Do not say any of the 5 forbidden words on the card.
flow.timer: Each turn has a time limit. Guess as many as possible.
flow.score: Each correct guess is worth 1 point. Highest score wins.

tip: Hand the phone to the clue giver. Guessers should not see the forbidden words.
rules: Hand the phone to the clue giver.
The clue giver explains the main word without saying the 5 forbidden words.
In individual mode, choose who guessed to record the point.
In team mode, the point goes to the current team.
When time runs out, pass to the next player or team.
